description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a variety of trees and landscaping, set adjacent to a paved road. The house features a dark gable roof, light-colored exterior walls, and a prominent front-facing garage with a driveway leading to the street. The front facade is symmetrical, with a central entryway flanked by windows and a small porch area. The property is bordered by dense foliage, including coniferous and deciduous trees, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The rear and sides of the house are also lined with trees, and the backyard appears to have additional landscaping elements.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, front garage, and surrounded by dense trees and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, garage, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, side windows, and the dense tree line extending along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the house mostly obscured by trees, showing the full width of the property and backyard foliage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the garage side, roofline, and the continuation of the tree border along the road.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, and flanking columns, integrated with a driveway and garage.
